howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our rigorous, transparent methodology ensures every assessment meets the highest standards of independence and accuracy.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We continuously monitor the European market for AI systems used in enterprise environments, identifying and cataloguing new entrants and updates.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Each system is classified according to the EU AI Act risk tiers and mapped against applicable industry-specific regulations.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Independent analysts evaluate each system against multiple regulatory frameworks using our standardised assessment methodology.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Compliance scores are published with full methodology transparency, including detailed breakdowns and evidence references.

evidenceBanner.title: Preview — evidence sources under verification
evidenceBanner.body: Claims on this page are being re-verified against each vendor's trust centre, DPA, sub-processor list, and certification registries. Every claim will carry a source link and verification date once the backfill is complete. If you rely on this data for a procurement decision today, verify independently against the vendor's source documents.

assessment.disclaimerText: This assessment is based on publicly available information as of the last review date. Scores reflect what can be verified from vendor documentation, trust centers, and public certifications. For a verified assessment tailored to your specific use case, contact us for a tailored assessment.

footer.tagline: The comprehensive platform for tracking, analyzing, and understanding AI systems operating within the European Union regulatory framework.
footer.aiTransparencyBody: This platform uses AI (Anthropic Claude) for its chatbot assistant and comparison tool. AI-generated responses are grounded in our assessed database and clearly labelled. No personal data is used for AI model training. All AI features comply with the EU AI Act transparency obligations (Article 50) and GDPR requirements for automated processing.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AI Compass EU. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: AI Compass EU provides information for educational and professional purposes. Our assessments are based on publicly available information and should not be considered legal advice. Consult qualified legal professionals for specific compliance requirements.

cookies.message: We use {strong}essential cookies only{strongEnd} (session management, rate limiting). No tracking, no advertising cookies. Our analytics are cookie-free.

system.claimCount: {count} {claims} · every value below links to the original source and the date we verified it
system.complianceScoresSubtitle: Each framework is assessed independently. Click to see the detailed breakdown.
system.disclaimerText: Based on publicly available information as of the last review. Scores reflect what can be verified from vendor documentation, trust centers, and public certifications. For a verified assessment tailored to your use case,

methodology.heroSubtitle: Every rating on AI Compass EU is built on a transparent, evidence-based methodology. Our 8 assessment dimensions cover the full spectrum of European AI compliance requirements.
methodology.processSubtitle: A rigorous, multi-step process ensures consistency, accuracy, and fairness across all assessments.
methodology.dimensionsSubtitle: Each AI system is evaluated across 8 weighted dimensions, with specific criteria and evidence requirements for every score.
methodology.gradingSubtitle: Each dimension receives a letter grade from A+ (exemplary) to D (non-compliant), weighted and aggregated into an overall score. All ratings include source references.

step.evidenceCollectionDesc: We gather public documentation, vendor disclosures, certifications, and independent audit reports for each AI system.
step.expertAssessmentDesc: Domain experts evaluate each dimension using standardized rubrics with defined scoring criteria and evidence requirements.
step.peerReviewDesc: A second assessor independently reviews the scoring, and any disagreements are resolved through structured deliberation.
step.scoreCalculationDesc: Weighted dimension scores are aggregated into an overall compliance score on a 0-100 scale, with confidence indicators.
step.continuousUpdatesDesc: Scores are re-evaluated when regulations change, vendors update their practices, or new evidence becomes available.

about.heroSubtitle: AI Compass EU is the independent, vendor-neutral platform that helps European organizations understand, evaluate, and deploy AI systems in compliance with EU regulations.
about.missionP1: The European AI landscape is evolving rapidly. With the EU AI Act in force and a growing patchwork of sector-specific regulations, organizations face unprecedented complexity in choosing and deploying AI systems responsibly.
about.missionP2: AI Compass EU was founded to bring clarity to this complexity. We provide independent compliance intelligence — transparent ratings, regulatory analysis, and practical guidance — so that decision-makers can act with confidence.
about.value1Desc: We accept no sponsorship, advertising, or vendor payments that could influence our ratings. Our revenue comes solely from subscriptions.
about.value2Desc: Every score we publish can be traced to verifiable evidence. Our methodology is fully documented and open to scrutiny.
about.value3Desc: Built in Europe, for Europe. We understand the regulatory landscape, cultural nuances, and multilingual requirements of the EU market.
about.value4Desc: Assessments are conducted by domain experts using standardized rubrics, not automated scraping or self-reported vendor claims.
about.contactText: AI Compass EU is an independent project built in Europe for European decision-makers. For questions, partnership enquiries, or press requests, contact us at {email}.

compare.heroSubtitle: Describe your use case in plain English. Get AI-matched recommendations from our database of assessed enterprise AI systems, then compare them side-by-side against EU compliance criteria.
compare.freeNotice: Free access covers the 5 most popular AI platforms.
compare.createAccountTitle: Create a Free Account to Compare
compare.createAccountDesc: Sign up for free to compare AI systems side-by-side against EU compliance criteria. Upgrade to Pro for access to all 60+ systems.
compare.describeHelp: Write in plain English. What problem are you solving? Who are the users? What data is involved? What decisions will the AI make or inform?
compare.describeHint: AI will match your requirements against 60+ assessed systems
compare.example1: Customer service chatbot for a bank that can handle account queries and flag potential fraud
compare.example2: Medical imaging AI to assist radiologists in detecting anomalies in X-rays
compare.example3: HR performance management system that analyses employee productivity and suggests development paths
compare.example4: Credit scoring AI for consumer lending decisions at a fintech company
compare.placeholder: Example: We want to automate the first stage of candidate screening for our EU recruitment process. The AI would score CVs and rank candidates before our HR team reviews them. We receive about 500 applications per month across Germany, France, and the Netherlands.
compare.loadingAnalyse: Analysing your use case against our database of 50+ AI systems…
compare.selectUpTo5: Select up to 5 systems to compare side-by-side
compare.limitedResults: Seeing limited results? Pro unlocks all 60+ AI systems.

compare.exportProDesc: Upgrade to Pro to export comparison data as CSV or JSON for procurement workflows, RFPs, and internal reviews.

vendorPrep.heroSubtitle: Prepare for your next vendor meeting with AI-generated talking points, tough questions, and compliance intelligence. Built for the customer, not the vendor.
vendorPrep.unlockDesc: Generate a complete meeting briefing kit with talking points, tough questions, and compliance intelligence for your vendor meetings. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.
vendorPrep.describeHelp: The more context you provide, the better your briefing will be. This is optional but highly recommended.
vendorPrep.describePlaceholder: Describe your upcoming vendor meeting — who’s attending, what’s the goal, what concerns you have. For example: ‘We have a second demo with Microsoft about Copilot next Tuesday. Our CTO and DPO will attend. Main concern is data residency — we need EU-only processing. They’re pushing a 3-year contract but we want flexibility...’
vendorPrep.meetingTitlePlaceholder: What’s the meeting about? e.g. Copilot Enterprise Demo #2
vendorPrep.keyConcernsPlaceholder: What are your main concerns or priorities for this meeting?
vendorPrep.meetingAgendaHelp: Paste the meeting agenda or describe what will be discussed. This helps generate talking points per agenda item.
vendorPrep.meetingAgendaPlaceholder:
1. Product overview & demo
2. Data residency and GDPR compliance
3. Integration with existing tools
4. Pricing and contract terms
5. Next steps

vendorPrep.disclaimerBody: This meeting briefing is generated by AI based on AI Compass EU assessment data. It should be used as a starting point for your vendor meeting preparation, not as legal or procurement advice. Verify all compliance claims and scores directly with the vendor.

businessCase.disclaimerBody: This business case is an AI-generated estimate for educational and indicative purposes only. Figures are based on publicly available information and industry benchmarks. AI Compass EU accepts no liability for the accuracy of these estimates. This should not be used as the sole basis for procurement decisions. We recommend validating all figures with vendor quotes and internal financial analysis.
businessCase.disclaimerShort: Estimates are indicative and AI-generated. Not financial advice.

rfp.heroSubtitle: Paste your RFP or RFI questions and get professional draft answers grounded in our independent AI system assessments. EU compliance, data sovereignty, certifications — all cited with real data.
rfp.unlockDesc: Generate professional draft answers to RFP and RFI questions, grounded in real compliance data, certifications, and EU regulatory intelligence. Available exclusively on the Enterprise plan.
rfp.questionsPlaceholder:
Paste your RFP/RFI questions here, one per line.

Example:
Describe your AI system’s compliance with the EU AI Act.
What data residency options are available within the EU?
How does the system handle personal data under GDPR?
What certifications does the vendor hold (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc.)?
rfp.companyContextPlaceholder:
Provide context about your organisation to personalise answers.

Example:
We are a 500-person financial services company based in Frankfurt. We process sensitive client data subject to DORA and BaFin regulations. We need EU-hosted solutions with SOC 2 certification.
rfp.companyContextHelp: This helps tailor answers to your specific regulatory context and requirements.
rfp.selectAtLeastOneSystem: Please select at least one AI system.
rfp.enterAtLeastOneQuestion: Please enter at least one question.
rfp.maxQuestionsError: Maximum 20 questions allowed. Please reduce your list.
rfp.loadingHint: Each question is processed sequentially for accuracy. This may take a few minutes.
rfp.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
rfp.disclaimerBody: These draft answers are generated by AI based on AI Compass EU assessment data. All responses should be reviewed and validated by your procurement team before inclusion in any formal RFP/RFI submission. This does not constitute legal or procurement advice.

checklist.presetFinancialDesc: EU AI Act + GDPR + DORA + EBA/EIOPA — complete financial services coverage
checklist.presetHealthcareDesc: EU AI Act + GDPR + MDR/IVDR — medical device AI compliance
checklist.presetCriticalDesc: EU AI Act + GDPR + NIS2 — for essential and important entities
checklist.presetFullDesc: AI Act + GDPR + DORA + NIS2 + Data Act — maximum regulatory coverage
